name: Planetary Avasthas
description: States or conditions of planets affecting their ability to deliver results
purpose: Determine functional strength and result-giving capacity of planets
importance: Critical for accurate prediction of planetary effects
vedicReferences: Detailed in Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra and Saravali
usage: Modify planetary strength and dasha results based on avastha

description: Five age-based states determining planetary maturity and strength

states.name: Bala
states.description: Planet in infantile state, immature, learning phase

results.positive: Fresh start, new beginnings, innocent approach, pure intentions
results.negative: Immaturity, weakness, dependency, incomplete results, naive mistakes

states.significationEffect: Significations weak and developing, needs support
states.dashaEffect: Dasha gives weak results, slow progress, learning experiences
states.remedies: Nurture the planet, strengthen through remedies, allow time for growth
states.example: Mars at 3° in Aries - infantile courage, impulsive but weak action

states.name: Kumara
states.description: Planet in youthful state, energetic but inexperienced
states.personality: Youthful, energetic, enthusiastic, somewhat experienced, experimenting

results.positive: Good energy, enthusiasm, willingness to try, some success
results.negative: Overconfidence, mistakes from inexperience, inconsistent results

states.dashaEffect: Dasha gives moderate results, enthusiastic efforts, some successes
states.remedies: Guide the planet's energy, provide direction through remedies
states.example: Venus at 9° in Taurus - youthful beauty, enthusiastic love, developing taste

states.name: Yuva
states.description: Planet in prime youth, full energy and capability

results.positive: Excellent results, peak performance, success, achievement, confidence
results.negative: Few negative effects - may be slightly overconfident

states.significationEffect: Significations at peak strength, delivers full results
states.dashaEffect: Dasha gives best results, major achievements, success period
states.remedies: Maintain planet's strength, optimize its positive effects
states.example: Jupiter at 15° in Sagittarius - peak wisdom, maximum expansion, great fortune

states.name: Vridha
states.description: Planet in elderly state, experienced but declining energy
states.personality: Wise, experienced, cautious, conservative, declining vitality

results.positive: Wisdom, experience, maturity, conservative approach benefits
results.negative: Declining energy, slower results, conservative limits, health issues

states.significationEffect: Significations wise but weakening, experience over energy
states.dashaEffect: Dasha gives experienced but slower results, wisdom-based outcomes
states.remedies: Support planet's vitality, respect its wisdom, strengthen carefully
states.example: Saturn at 21° in Capricorn - elderly discipline, great experience, slowing action

states.name: Mrita
states.description: Planet in death-like state, exhausted, ending phase

results.positive: Completion, endings leading to new beginnings, moksha orientation
results.negative: Exhaustion, very weak results, failure, loss, death-like experiences

states.significationEffect: Significations extremely weak, ending cycle, needs transformation
states.dashaEffect: Dasha gives very weak results, endings, losses, transformation period
states.remedies: Allow completion, prepare for transformation, strong remedies needed
states.example: Moon at 27° in Cancer - exhausted emotions, ending emotional cycle, need for renewal

interpretation: Check each planet's degree to determine its Balaadi Avastha and modify predictions accordingly
vedicReferences: BPHS - Balaadi Avasthas for planetary strength

description: Three consciousness states - awake, dreaming, sleeping
basis: Planetary positions in specific houses from lagna

states.name: Jagrat
states.description: Planet fully conscious and actively delivering results
states.personality: Fully aware, active, manifesting, conscious, directly impacting

results.positive: Full positive results, clear benefits, active success, conscious achievements
results.negative: Full negative results if malefic, clear obstacles, active problems

states.significationEffect: Significations fully manifest and clearly experienced
states.dashaEffect: Dasha results clear and strong, direct experiences, manifest outcomes
states.interpretation: Planet acts with full consciousness and delivers complete results

states.name: Swapna
states.description: Planet in dream state, indirect or delayed results
states.personality: Semi-aware, dreaming, indirect, delayed, somewhat unclear

results.positive: Good results but indirect, dream-like success, delayed benefits
results.negative: Confusing problems, unclear obstacles, indirect difficulties

states.significationEffect: Significations manifest indirectly or in dream-like ways
states.dashaEffect: Dasha results indirect, dream-like experiences, delayed outcomes
states.interpretation: Planet acts indirectly, results come through indirect means or delayed

states.name: Sushupti
states.description: Planet in deep sleep, minimal or hidden results
states.personality: Unconscious, sleeping, hidden, deeply delayed, subconscious

results.positive: Hidden benefits, subconscious blessings, minimal but deep effects
results.negative: Hidden problems, subconscious blocks, minimal manifest difficulties

states.significationEffect: Significations mostly hidden or subconscious, minimal manifest effects
states.dashaEffect: Dasha results hidden or minimal, subconscious experiences, very delayed
states.interpretation: Planet sleeping, gives minimal or hidden results, mostly subconscious

interpretation: Assess planet's house position from lagna to determine consciousness state
vedicReferences: BPHS - Jagradaadi Avasthas for result manifestation

description: Nine luminosity states based on specific degree ranges

states.name: Deepta
states.condition: Planet in deep exaltation (within 5° of exact exaltation degree)
states.description: Planet blazing with maximum light and power
states.results: Exceptional positive results, brilliant success, peak manifestation
states.example: Sun at 10° Aries - blazing authority, maximum vitality, exceptional leadership

states.name: Swastha
states.condition: Planet in own sign or friend's sign
states.description: Planet comfortable and performing well
states.results: Strong positive results, comfortable success, natural performance
states.example: Venus in Taurus - comfortable luxury, natural beauty, easy relationships

states.name: Pramudita
states.condition: Planet in great friend's sign or aspected by benefics
states.description: Planet delighted and joyful in functioning
states.results: Good positive results, joyful outcomes, pleasant experiences
states.example: Jupiter aspected by Venus - delighted wisdom, joyful expansion, pleasant growth

states.name: Shanta
states.condition: Planet in neutral sign or with neutral influences
states.description: Planet peaceful and neutral in functioning
states.results: Moderate results, peaceful state, balanced outcomes
states.example: Mercury in Aries - peaceful intellect, neutral communication, balanced thinking

states.name: Sakta
states.condition: Planet with good shadbala and dignity
states.description: Planet capable and able to deliver
states.results: Good results through capability, competent performance
states.example: Mars with good shadbala - capable courage, able action, competent performance

states.name: Peedita
states.condition: Planet in enemy sign or afflicted by malefics
states.description: Planet afflicted and suffering
states.results: Weak negative results, afflicted outcomes, suffering experiences
states.example: Moon afflicted by Saturn - afflicted mind, suffering emotions, painful feelings

states.name: Dheena
states.condition: Planet in debilitation sign
states.description: Planet weak and debilitated
states.results: Very weak results, debilitated manifestation, ineffective outcomes
states.example: Sun in Libra - debilitated authority, weak vitality, ineffective leadership

states.name: Vikala
states.condition: Planet combust, retrograde, or severely afflicted
states.description: Planet crippled and unable to function properly
states.results: Extremely weak results, crippled functioning, severely impaired
states.example: Mercury combust within 4° of Sun - crippled intellect, impaired communication, disabled thinking

states.name: Khala
states.condition: Planet in 6th, 8th, or 12th house with malefic association
states.description: Planet mischievous and creating problems
states.results: Negative results, mischievous problems, troublesome outcomes
states.example: Mars in 8th house with Saturn - mischievous accidents, troublesome surgeries, harmful actions

interpretation: Determine planet's condition to assess its Deeptaadi Avastha
vedicReferences: BPHS - Deeptaadi Avasthas for luminosity assessment

description: Six states based on planetary afflictions and conditions

states.name: Lajjita
states.condition: Planet with Moon in 5th, 9th house, or associated with malefics
states.description: Planet feeling ashamed and unable to perform openly
states.results: Results with shame, hidden effects, embarrassed manifestation
states.interpretation: Planet unable to give full results due to shame or embarrassment
states.example: Venus with Moon in 5th - ashamed in love, shy romance, embarrassed beauty

states.name: Garvita
states.condition: Planet in exaltation or in 10th house with good aspects
states.description: Planet proud and confident in functioning
states.results: Results with pride and confidence, possibly arrogant
states.interpretation: Planet delivers results with pride, sometimes excessive ego
states.example: Sun in Aries in 10th - proud authority, confident leadership, arrogant power

states.name: Kshudita
states.condition: Planet in 6th or 8th house or aspected by malefics
states.description: Planet hungry and craving results
states.results: Results sought desperately, hungry outcomes, anxious manifestation
states.interpretation: Planet desperate for results, creates hunger and need
states.example: Jupiter in 6th - hungry for wisdom, craving expansion, desperate growth

states.name: Trushita
states.condition: Planet in fire signs (Aries, Leo, Sagittarius) with malefic aspects
states.description: Planet thirsty and seeking satisfaction
states.results: Unsatisfied results, thirsty for more, yearning outcomes
states.interpretation: Planet creates thirst, never fully satisfied
states.example: Venus in Leo with Mars aspect - thirsty for love, seeking satisfaction, yearning pleasure

states.name: Kshobhita
states.condition: Planet in 6th, 8th, 12th house with malefic conjunctions
states.description: Planet agitated and disturbed in functioning
states.results: Disturbed results, agitated outcomes, restless manifestation
states.example: Moon in 6th with Mars - agitated mind, disturbed emotions, anxious feelings

states.name: Mudita
states.condition: Planet in 1st, 4th, 5th, 7th, 9th, 10th house with benefic aspects
states.description: Planet delighted and joyful in functioning
states.results: Joyful results, delighted outcomes, happy manifestation
states.interpretation: Planet delivers results with joy and delight
states.example: Jupiter in 9th with Venus aspect - delighted wisdom, joyful expansion, happy fortune

interpretation: Check planet's affliction conditions to determine Lajjitaadi Avastha
vedicReferences: BPHS - Lajjitaadi Avasthas for emotional states

description: Twelve states based on planetary positions and activities

states.name: Shayana
states.condition: Planet in 12th house from lagna
states.description: Planet sleeping and inactive
states.effects: Minimal results, inactive, sleeping state, subconscious effects only
states.results: Very weak results, mostly subconscious or hidden effects
states.example: Mars in 12th - sleeping courage, inactive energy, hidden action

states.name: Upavesha
states.condition: Planet in own sign or friendly sign
states.description: Planet sitting comfortably
states.effects: Good results, comfortable, stable functioning, relaxed delivery
states.results: Strong stable results, comfortable outcomes, relaxed success
states.example: Venus in Taurus - sitting comfortably, stable luxury, relaxed beauty

states.name: Netrapani
states.condition: Planet in 10th house or aspecting 10th
states.description: Planet actively working with focus
states.effects: Active results, working hard, focused delivery, productive outcomes
states.results: Excellent work results, productive success, focused achievement
states.example: Saturn in 10th - actively working, focused discipline, productive hard work

states.name: Prakashana
states.condition: Planet in exaltation or with high dignity
states.description: Planet illuminating and radiating
states.effects: Brilliant results, illuminating effects, radiant success, enlightening outcomes
states.results: Exceptional brilliant results, enlightening success, radiant manifestation
states.example: Sun at 10° Aries - illuminating authority, brilliant vitality, radiant leadership

states.name: Gamana
states.condition: Planet in movable signs (Aries, Cancer, Libra, Capricorn)
states.description: Planet in motion and traveling
states.effects: Moving results, changing outcomes, travel-related, dynamic manifestation
states.results: Dynamic results with movement, travel effects, changing outcomes
states.example: Moon in Cancer - moving emotions, traveling mind, dynamic feelings

states.name: Agamana
states.condition: Planet moving towards exaltation point
states.description: Planet coming into strength
states.effects: Arriving results, strengthening effects, improving outcomes, approaching success
states.results: Strengthening results, improving outcomes, approaching peak
states.example: Jupiter at 3° Cancer - arriving to exaltation, strengthening wisdom, improving fortune

states.name: Sabha
states.condition: Planet in 7th or 10th house with other planets
states.description: Planet in public assembly
states.effects: Public results, assembly outcomes, social manifestation, collective impact
states.results: Public success, social outcomes, collective results
states.example: Venus in 7th with Jupiter - in social assembly, public relationships, collective beauty

states.name: Agama
states.condition: Planet in 9th house or aspecting 9th
states.description: Planet on dharmic path
states.effects: Dharmic results, philosophical outcomes, spiritual manifestation, righteous delivery
states.results: Dharmic success, philosophical outcomes, spiritual results
states.example: Jupiter in 9th - on dharma path, philosophical wisdom, spiritual fortune

states.name: Bhojana
states.condition: Planet in 2nd house
states.description: Planet eating and consuming
states.effects: Consuming results, wealth effects, food-related, nourishment outcomes
states.results: Wealth results, nourishing outcomes, consuming effects
states.example: Moon in 2nd - eating emotions, nourishing feelings, wealth through mind

states.name: Nrityalipsa
states.condition: Planet in 5th house or with creative influences
states.description: Planet in creative joyful state
states.effects: Creative results, joyful outcomes, artistic manifestation, playful delivery
states.results: Creative success, artistic outcomes, joyful results
states.example: Venus in 5th - desire to dance, creative beauty, joyful arts, playful romance

states.name: Kautuka
states.condition: Planet with Mercury or in 3rd house
states.description: Planet curious and eager to learn
states.effects: Curious results, learning outcomes, eager manifestation, inquisitive delivery
states.results: Learning results, curious outcomes, eager exploration
states.example: Mercury in 3rd - curious intellect, eager communication, learning skills

states.name: Nidra
states.condition: Planet debilitated or in extreme weakness
states.description: Planet in deep sleep and unconscious
states.effects: No results, unconscious state, completely inactive, dormant outcomes
states.results: Almost no results, dormant state, unconscious effects only
states.example: Sun in Libra at 10° - deep sleep authority, unconscious vitality, dormant leadership

interpretation: Most detailed avastha system - check all conditions for accurate assessment
vedicReferences: BPHS - Shayanadi Avasthas most comprehensive system

name: Practical Application
description: How to use avasthas in chart analysis and predictions

steps.method: Check each planet's exact degree to find its age state
Note which houses planets occupy to determine consciousness
Check exaltation, debilitation, dignity for luminosity
Check all 12 conditions for most detailed state
Combine all avastha assessments for final judgment

examples.planet: Sun at 15° Aries in 10th house, no afflictions
examples.finalAssessment: Extremely strong Sun - peak authority, excellent career, brilliant leadership
examples.dashaEffect: Sun dasha will give exceptional career success and authority

examples.planet: Moon at 28° Scorpio in 6th house with Saturn
examples.finalAssessment: Extremely weak Moon - severe mental stress, mother problems, emotional exhaustion
examples.dashaEffect: Moon dasha will give mental health challenges, emotional difficulties, need remedies

examples.planet: Venus at 9° Pisces in 7th house with Jupiter aspect
examples.finalAssessment: Strong Venus - good marriage prospects, artistic success, social charm, exalted effects
examples.dashaEffect: Venus dasha will give marriage, artistic success, luxury, relationship joy

importantNotes: Shayanadi is most comprehensive but complex
Weak avasthas reduce even exalted planet results
Strong avasthas improve even debilitated planets somewhat
Use avasthas to fine-tune dasha predictions
Remedies should target weak avastha planets first
vedicReferences: Complete avastha analysis detailed in BPHS chapters on planetary states
